CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David Marcolini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary E. Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Cocina Poblana of Oakland, Inc., a California corporation, dba Cocina Poblana, Cocina Poblana of San Francisco, Inc., a California corporation, Cocina Poblana of Emeryville, Inc., a California corporation, or Lito Saldana, a/k/a Lito U. Saldana, individually as guarantor of Cocina Poblana.
Defaults were entered against defendants on January 21, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 21, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against the Defaulted Defendants Cocina Poblana of Oakland, Inc., a California corporation, dba Cocina Poblana, Cocina Poblana of San Francisco, Inc., a California corporation, Cocina Poblana of Emeryville, Inc., a California corporation, and Lito Saldana, a/k/a Lito U. Saldana, individually as guarantor of Cocina Poblana, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,942.23.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,695.55.
Attorney Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $650.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $35,287.78.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Continued To May-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
